name: windowz
desc: Sets the Z value of the dialogue text window to the specified value. Should be lower than hudz but higher than textz, see Z ordering and spritesets.

name: uninterruptible
desc: Takes a list of function labels to be defined as uninterruptible. While one of these functions is in the call stack, execution will never be returned to the dialogue.

params.name: labels
params.desc: One or more labels to set as uninterruptible

name: timestamp
desc: Stores the current time as a Unix timestamp (in seconds) to the given variable.

params.name: target
params.desc: Integer variable to receive the timestamp

name: textz
desc: Sets the Z value of the dialogue text itself to the specified value. Should be lower than windowz, but not smaller than 0, see Z ordering and spritesets.

name: skipgosub
desc: Defines a subroutine to be called whenever a click wait is encountered while in skip mode.

name: setdefaultspeed
desc: No longer functional (removed). Originally added to set default text speed, later removed.

name: movs
desc: Assigns a special string (newline or double quote) to a string variable.

params.name: target
params.desc: String variable to receive the special string

name: ignore_inl_cmd_clear
desc: Clears the list of ignored inline commands.

name: ignore_inl_cmd
desc: Adds the given strings to the list of ignored inline commands. These commands will not be executed when encountered within a dialogue line.

params.name: commands
params.desc: One or more command names to ignore

name: ignore_cmd_clear
desc: Clears the list of ignored script commands.

name: ignore_cmd
desc: Adds the given strings to the list of ignored script commands. If a command encountered is in this list, it will be ignored instead of executed.

params.name: commands
params.desc: One or more command names to ignore

name: hudz
desc: Sets the Z value of the HUD to the specified value. Should be higher than windowz but lower than the Z value of the highest spriteset.

name: getstralias
desc: Looks up the given key string in the table of string aliases and assigns the value to the given variable. Raises error if key not found.

params.name: target
params.desc: String variable to receive the alias value

name: event_callback
desc: Sets the event callback to the specified subroutine. This subroutine is called right before a command is executed, whenever the state of the script has changed due to external factors (automode or skip mode). Define section only.

name: disablespeedbuttons
desc: No longer has any effect; will cause the engine to exit with an error. Originally intended to disable keyboard shortcuts for text speed.

name: borderstyle
desc: Sets the style of the outline around dialogue text characters for either the sentence font or the name font. Multiple forms exist.

params.name: border width
params.desc: Width of the outline in pixels. Use -1 to remove outline.

params.name: border colour
params.desc: Colour of the outline (required unless width is -1).

name: borderstyle
desc: Removes outline for the sentence font.

name: borderstyle
desc: Sets outline for the name font.

params.name: border width
params.desc: Width of the outline in pixels.

params.name: name font flag
params.desc: Any value (e.g., 1) to target the name font.

name: borderstyle
desc: Removes outline for the name font.

params.name: name font flag
params.desc: Any value (e.g., 1) to target the name font.

name: zenkakko
desc: Has no effect in ONScripter-RU.

name: windoweffect
desc: Sets an effect to use when the text window is hidden or unhidden. Parameters are identical to effect command, but without effect number.

name: windowchip
desc: Attaches the given sprite to the text window, so that it is displayed when the window is shown and disappears when the window is hidden. Define section only.

params.name: sprite number
params.desc: Number of the sprite to attach

name: windowback
desc: Completely removed in ONScripter-RU, will always raise an error.

name: versionstr
desc: Sets the version string displayed in the About dialog. Can be used in game section as well (unlike other variants).

name: usewheel
desc: Sets btnwait commands to detect mouse wheel movement. Wheel up returns -2, wheel down returns -3. Timeout returns -5 instead of -2.

name: useescspc
desc: Sets btnwait commands to detect Esc key (returns -10) or Spacebar (returns -11).

name: underline
desc: Sets the Y position of tachi sprites (see ld).

name: transmode
desc: Sets the default transparency mode for images that don't specify one. Possible modes: leftup, copy, righttup. Define section only.

name: time
desc: Stores the current local time in the specified variables.

name: textgosub
desc: Defines the subroutine called when a text click wait (e.g., [@] inline command) is encountered. This subroutine should perform the click wait itself.

name: tan
desc: Computes the tangent of the given angle (in degrees), multiplies by 1000, and stores the rounded result in the target variable.

name: sub
desc: Subtracts the specified value from the specified variable.

name: stralias
desc: Defines a string alias. The alias name can be used instead of the string value in all following commands. Define section only.

name: spritesetz
desc: Sets the maximum Z value of the spriteset with the specified number.

name: spi
desc: Alias of soundpressplgin. Does nothing.

name: soundpressplgin
desc: No longer needed; does nothing at all.

name: skip
desc: Jumps forward (positive number) or backward (negative number) in the script by the specified number of commands.

params.name: number of lines
params.desc: Number of commands to skip (can be negative)

name: sin
desc: Computes the sine of the given angle (in degrees), multiplies by 1000, and stores the rounded result in the target variable.

name: shadedistance
desc: Specifies the position of the text shadow for dialogue text or name text, or disables it (both offsets 0). Multiple forms exist.

name: shadedistance
desc: Sets shadow colour for sentence font.

name: shadedistance
desc: Removes shadow for name font.

params.name: name font flag
params.desc: Any value (e.g., 1) to target name font

name: shadedistance
desc: Sets shadow for name font with colour.

params.name: name font flag
params.desc: Any value (e.g., 1) to target name font

name: setlayer
desc: Sets the specified effect layer number to the specified DLL file, refreshed at the specified interval (in milliseconds). Only certain DLLs are emulated.

params.name: dll file name
params.desc: Name of the DLL (snow.dll, hana.dll, video.dll, fall.dll, ass.dll)

name: setkinsoku
desc: No longer has any effect in ONScripter-RU. Define section only.

name: selectvoice
desc: Sets paths to sound files that play at certain points in a choice window context. Define section only.

params.name: open sound
params.desc: File path for sound when choice window opens

params.name: hover sound
params.desc: File path for sound when hovering over a button

params.name: click sound
params.desc: File path for sound when making a choice

name: selectcolor
desc: Specifies the colours a choice text should have when the mouse does and does not hover over it.

name: savenumber
desc: Sets the number of save files. No longer has any effect in ONScripter-RU.

name: savename
desc: Removed in ONScripter-RU.

name: savedir
desc: Sets the directory, relative to the save path, at which save files should be stored. Define section only.

name: sar
desc: No description available.

name: rubyon2
desc: Removed in ONScripter-RU.

name: rubyon
desc: Removed in ONScripter-RU.

name: rubyoff
desc: Removed in ONScripter-RU.

name: roff
desc: Disables the use of right clicks to advance text at click waits. Define section only.

name: rmenu
desc: Removed in ONScripter-RU. Use textbtnwait instead.

name: rgosub
desc: Removed in ONScripter-RU. Use textbtnwait instead. Define section only.

name: return
desc: Returns from a subroutine entered using gosub or related commands, or from a custom command defined with defsub.

name: pretextgosub
desc: Sets a subroutine that will be called right before any text display command is executed.

name: pagetag
desc: Has no practical consequence anymore in ONScripter-RU. Define section only.

name: numalias
desc: Defines an alias for a number (like stralias but for integers).

name: nsadir
desc: No description available.

name: nsa
desc: No description available.

name: notif
desc: Like if, but inverted – executes the given commands if the condition is NOT true.

name: next
desc: Ends the body of a for loop.

name: ns3
desc: No description available.

name: ns2
desc: No description available.

name: mul
desc: Multiplies the variable by the number and stores the result in the variable.

name: movl
desc: Enters numbers into an array all at once.

params.name: values
params.desc: One or more numeric values to assign

name: mov10
desc: Fills 10 numeric variables - starting from the one specified and incrementing upward - with the specified numbers.

name: mov9
desc: Fills 9 numeric variables starting from the one specified.

name: mov8
desc: Fills 8 numeric variables starting from the one specified.

name: mov7
desc: Fills 7 numeric variables starting from the one specified.

name: mov6
desc: Fills 6 numeric variables starting from the one specified.

name: mov5
desc: Fills 5 numeric variables starting from the one specified.

name: mov4
desc: Fills 4 numeric variables starting from the one specified.

name: mov3
desc: Fills 3 numeric variables starting from the one specified.

name: mov
desc: Assigns a numeric variable with a new value.

name: mov
desc: Assigns a string variable with a new value.

name: mode_wave_demo
desc: No description available.

name: mode_saya
desc: No description available.

name: mode_ext
desc: No description available.

name: mod
desc: Finds the remainder after the variable is divided by the number.

params.name: value
params.desc: Numeric value to divide by and get remainder

name: mid
desc: Extracts a substring from the given character string.

params.name: result
params.desc: String variable to receive the substring

name: menusetwindow
desc: No description available.

name: menuselectvoice
desc: Removed in ONScripter-RU. Define section only.

name: menuselectcolor
desc: Removed in ONScripter-RU.

name: maxkaisoupage
desc: Removed in ONScripter-RU. Define section only.

name: luasub
desc: Defines a new command that executes a Lua function instead of an NScripter label.

name: luacall
desc: Enables a Lua callback for a certain action. Only supported callback name is 'animation'.

name: lookbacksp
desc: Has no effect in ONScripter-RU; implement custom lookback instead.

name: lookbackcolor
desc: Has no effect in ONScripter-RU; see lookbacksp.

name: loadgosub
desc: Designates a subroutine to be called after a save state is successfully loaded.

name: linepage2
desc: Has no effect in ONScripter-RU.

name: linepage
desc: Has no effect in ONScripter-RU.

name: len
desc: Measures the length of the given string in bytes and writes the result to the given variable. See count_string for UTF-8.

name: labellog
desc: Enables logging of accessed labels to a file. Define section only.

name: labelexist
desc: Stores 1 in the result variable if the specified label exists, else 0.

name: kidokuskip
desc: Enters kidoku ('unread') skip mode, causing the script to skip to the next unread line.

name: kidokumode
desc: No practical effect in ONScripter-RU.

name: itoa2
desc: Converts an integer to a numeric string using full-width digits.

name: itoa
desc: Converts an integer to a numeric string using half-width (western) digits.

name: intlimit
desc: Restricts the value of a numeric variable between min and max.

name: inc
desc: Increments a numeric variable by 1.

name: if
desc: Executes commands if the condition is true.

name: humanz
desc: Specifies the highest Z value a sprite can have and still be drawn on the screen. See Z ordering.

name: humanpos
desc: Sets the X positions of tachi sprites at left, center, and right positions.

name: gosub
desc: Jumps to and begins execution at the given label. Can return with return.

name: globalon
desc: Turns on the use of global variables.

name: getparam
desc: Retrieves parameters given to a user-defined command.

params.name: variables
params.desc: One or more variables (numeric or string) to receive the arguments

name: getparam
desc: Retrieves parameters given to a user-defined command.

params.name: variables
params.desc: One or more variables (numeric or string) to receive the arguments

name: for
desc: Basic loop construct.

name: filelog
desc: Enables creation of a file log (records resources used).

name: errorsave
desc: Specifies that when certain recoverable errors occur, the game state should automatically be saved (in savefile 999). Define section only.

name: english
desc: Has no effect in ONScripter-RU. You may be looking for language instead.

name: effectcut
desc: Skips all effects in 'skip to next choice' mode.

name: effectblank
desc: Sets wait time after an effect is finished before next command.

name: effect
desc: Defines a visual effect number from a built-in effect.

name: dsound
desc: Has no effect in ONScripter-RU.

name: div
desc: Divides the variable by the number, truncating remainder.

name: dim
desc: Defines an array variable.

name: defvoicevol
desc: Defines the default volume for voice playback.

name: defsub
desc: Defines a new custom command. When encountered, the NScripter label with the same name is executed.

name: defsevol
desc: Defines the default volume for sound effect playback.

name: defmp3vol
desc: Defines the default volume for mp3/BGM playback.

name: defbgmvol
desc: Synonym for defmp3vol.

name: defvideovol
desc: Defines the default volume for video playback.

name: defaultspeed
desc: Removed in ONScripter-RU. Define section only.

name: defaultfont
desc: Defines a default font (may not have effect in ONScripter-RU).

name: dec
desc: Decrements a numeric variable by 1.

name: date
desc: Stores today's date in the given variables. Year modulo 100, month 1-based.

name: cos
desc: Computes cosine of angle (degrees), multiplies by 1000, stores rounded result.

name: cmp
desc: Compares two character strings. Returns 0 if equal, positive if first comes before, negative if second comes before.

name: clickvoice
desc: Specifies sounds to play when a button is clicked during a click wait state.

name: clickstr
desc: Forces a click wait state when the interpreter encounters one of the characters in the given string.

params.name: clickwait characters
params.desc: String of characters that trigger click wait

params.name: lines left
params.desc: Number of lines left on page to activate page wait

name: clickskippage
desc: If set, a click during text output jumps to the next page wait instead of click wait.

name: btnnowindowerase
desc: Define section only. No description available.

name: break
desc: Breaks out of a single loop.

params.name: label
params.desc: Optional label to jump to (unsafe, use with caution)

name: automode
desc: No effect in practice (automode already enabled). Define section only.

name: atoi
desc: Converts a numeric string to an integer.

name: arc
desc: Sets the default archive format to SAR and loads the given file.

name: addnsadir
desc: Adds a directory to be checked for NScripter archives (nsa or ns2).

name: addkinsoku
desc: No longer has any effect. Define section only.

name: add
desc: Adds a value to a variable (arithmetic addition for ints, concatenation for strings).

name: add
desc: Concatenates a string to a string variable.

name: z_order_override2
desc: Sets the Z order override for an extended sprite. Game section only.

name: z_order_override
desc: Sets the Z order override for a regular sprite. Game section only.

name: z_override_preserve
desc: Toggles whether to preserve the Z order override in parseTaggedString. Game section only.

name: wheelvalue
desc: Reads the difference in mouse scroll wheel position since last call into the variable. Game section only.

name: wait2
desc: Waits for the specified duration in milliseconds; not skippable by user. Game section only.

name: waitlips
desc: Waits for the end of the current lip animation (skippable). Game section only.

name: waits
desc: Same as wait, but entirely skippable. Game section only.

name: waitvoice
desc: Waits for playback in audio channel 0 with various masks. Game section only.

params.name: mask
params.desc: 0: skippable, 1: not skippable, 2: skippable ignore voice status, 3: not skippable ignore voice status

name: waitvideo
desc: Waits for video playback to finish. Game section only.

name: wait_on_d
desc: Waits for a [#] pipe wait or the end of a dialogue line played with d2. Game section only.

params.name: index
params.desc: Index of pipe character to wait on, or -1 for end of dialogue

name: vv_setlog
desc: Sets the voice volume for a log entry to be saved using setlog. Game section only.

name: videovol
desc: Sets the volume of the video to be played. Game section only.

name: video
desc: Loads and plays a video using ffmpeg. Game section only.

params.name: click
params.desc: 1 = skippable by click, 0 = call trap handler

name: verify_files
desc: Verifies integrity of game files with a hash file. Game section only.

name: tree_setra
desc: Like tree_seta, but raises error if '=' not used in path. Game section only.

name: tree_setr
desc: Like tree_set, but raises error if '=' not used in path. Game section only.

name: tree_seta
desc: Like tree_set, but stores inserted branch number if 'auto' used. Game section only.

name: tree_set
desc: Adds a node in a string tree or sets its value. Game section only.

name: tree_set
desc: Adds a node in a string tree or sets its value. Game section only.

name: tree_exec
desc: Performs depth-first search on a string tree and executes command nodes. Game section only.

name: tree_get
desc: Retrieves the value of a node in a string tree. Game section only.

name: tree_get
desc: Retrieves the value of a node in a string tree. Game section only.

name: tree_clear
desc: Clears a string tree, removing all nodes. Game section only.

name: text_speed_t
desc: Temporarily overrides text display speed for current dialogue window. Game section only.

name: text_fade_t
desc: Temporarily overrides text fade duration for current dialogue window. Game section only.

name: text_speed
desc: Sets the speed at which text is displayed (0 slowest, 10 instant).

name: text_fade
desc: Sets the fade-in time for dialogue text characters in milliseconds.

name: textatlas
desc: Enables the glyph atlas for caching rendered glyphs. Define section only.

name: texec3
desc: Begins a new text page without rerendering the dialogue window. Game section only.

name: talsp
desc: Changes the opacity of a regular sprite (0 transparent, 255 opaque). Game section only.

name: ssa_stop
desc: Stops subtitle playback on a subtitle effect layer. Game section only.

name: ssa_load
desc: Starts playback of an ASS subtitle file on an effect layer. Game section only.

name: ssa_font
desc: Sets the default font for subtitle playback on a subtitle effect layer. Game section only.

name: stopwatch
desc: Measures time since last stopwatch call and logs a debug message. Game section only.

name: stopvideo
desc: Stops video playback started with video. Game section only.

name: setlog
desc: Adds an entry to the message log. Game section only.

params.name: tree number
params.desc: Tree to add log node to

name: aspt2
desc: Same as aspt but for extended sprites. Game section only.

name: aspt
desc: Sets a sprite property to an absolute value, optionally animating. Game section only.

params.name: property name
params.desc: Property name (xpos, ypos, alpha, darken_r, darken_g, darken_b, blur, breakup, breakupdir, quakexmul, quakexamp, quakexcycle, quakeymul, quakeyamp, quakeycycle, warp_amp, warp_wave, warp_spd, scroll_h, scroll_w, scroll_y, scroll_x, flip)

name: spt2
desc: Same as spt but for extended sprites. Game section only.

params.name: property name
params.desc: Property name (same as aspt plus scalex, scaley, rot)

name: spt
desc: Sets a sprite property relative to current value, optionally animating. Game section only.

name: spriteset_pos
desc: Moves a spriteset to a given position. Game section only.

name: spriteset_mask
desc: Sets a mask for a spriteset. Game section only.

params.name: mask sprite number
params.desc: Sprite number to use as mask

name: spriteset_enable
desc: Shows or hides a spriteset. Game section only.

params.name: visibility
params.desc: Optional: 1 = visible, 0 = invisible; if omitted, makes visible

name: spriteset_blur
desc: Applies a blur filter to a spriteset. Game section only.

name: spriteset_alpha
desc: Sets opacity of a spriteset (0 transparent, 255 opaque). Game section only.

name: sptwait2
desc: Waits for an extended sprite property animation to finish. Game section only.

name: sptwait
desc: Waits for a regular sprite property animation to finish. Game section only.

name: snaplog
desc: Snaps a special scrollable sprite to a log entry by label. Game section only.

name: scroll_exceeds2
desc: Same as scroll_exceeds for extended sprites. Game section only.

params.name: result
params.desc: Variable to receive 1 if scrollable area exceeds visible

name: scroll_exceeds
desc: Checks if a scrollable sprite's height exceeds displayed area. Game section only.

name: scrollable_scroll
desc: Scrolls a special scrollable sprite up or down by number of rows. Game section only.

params.name: rows
params.desc: Number of rows to scroll (negative up, positive down)

name: scrollable_get_hovered_elem
desc: Retrieves index of hovered element in a scrollable sprite. Game section only.

name: scrollable_display
desc: Displays a special scrollable sprite. Game section only.

name: scrollable_cfg
desc: Configures a special scrollable sprite. Game section only.

name: scrollable_cfg
desc: Configures a special scrollable sprite. Game section only.

params.name: value
params.desc: Numeric value of scrollable sprite's property

name: scrollable_cfg
desc: Configures a special scrollable sprite. Game section only.

name: scrollable_cfg
desc: Configures a special scrollable sprite. Game section only.

params.name: value
params.desc: Tight fit mode (0 = neither, 1 = bottom only, 2 = top only, 3 = both)

name: scrollable_cfg
desc: Configures a special scrollable sprite. Game section only.

params.name: value
params.desc: Mouse over response flag (will each text element change colour if hovered over)

name: scrollable_cfg
desc: Configures a special scrollable sprite. Game section only.

params.name: colour multiplier
params.desc: Colour multiplier, relative to the normal font colour

name: scrollable
desc: Creates a special scrollable sprite. Game section only.

name: savereset
desc: Irreversibly deletes the save data directory and relaunches the engine. Game section only.

name: gptwait
desc: Waits for a global property transition animation to finish. Game section only.

name: agpt
desc: Sets a global property to an absolute value, optionally animating. Game section only.

params.name: property name
params.desc: Global property name (quakexmul, quakexamp, quakexcycle, quakeymul, quakeyamp, quakeycycle, onionscale, onionalpha, extension, blur, xpos, ypos, centrex, centrey, warp_amp, warp_wave, warp_spd)

params.name: override
params.desc: Optional override flag (1 to override existing animation)

name: gpt
desc: Sets a global property relative to current value, optionally animating. Game section only.

name: goto
desc: Jumps to a label; also checks superskip termination. Game section only.

name: getscriptpath
desc: Retrieves the path of a loaded script by index. Game section only.

params.name: base
params.desc: Optional: if set, remove file extension

name: getscriptnum
desc: Stores the number of loaded scripts. Game section only.

name: getvideovol
desc: Queries current video playback volume. Game section only.

name: getrenderername
desc: Gets name of a renderer by index, or current renderer if -1. Game section only.

params.name: result
params.desc: Receives renderer name (GLES2, GLES3, GL2, ANGLE2, ANGLE3)

name: getrenderernum
desc: Counts available renderers. Game section only.

name: getlog2
desc: Stores currently or last displayed dialogue text. Game section only.

name: sskip
desc: Performs a superskip from source to destination label. Game section only.

name: sskip_unset
desc: Signals end of superskip and resumes I/O operations. Game section only.

name: spritesetptwait
desc: Waits for a spriteset property animation to finish. Game section only.

params.name: property name
params.desc: Property name (xpos, ypos, alpha, blur, breakup, breakupdir, pixelate, warp_amp, warp_wave, warp_spd, centrex, centrey, scalex, scaley, rot, flip)

name: aspritesetpt
desc: Sets a spriteset property to an absolute value, optionally animating. Game section only.

name: spritesetpt
desc: Sets a spriteset property relative to current value, optionally animating. Game section only.

name: splitstring
desc: Splits a string on a delimiter (single char) into variables. Game section only.

params.name: result variables
params.desc: One or more string variables to receive tokens

name: smart_quotes
desc: Enables smart quotes conversion. Game section only.

name: skip_unread
desc: Enables or disables skipping to unread dialogue/Ctrl fast-forward. Game section only.

name: skip_enable
desc: Re-enables skipping after skip_disable. Game section only.

name: skip_disable
desc: Disables left-click skipping; also terminates auto mode and normal skip mode. Game section only.

name: setvoicewaitmul
desc: Sets the voice wait multiplier (float as string). Game section only.

name: set_scale_center
desc: Sets the scale center of an extended sprite as offset from image center. Game section only.

name: set_hotspot
desc: Sets the hotspot of an extended sprite (fractional pixels as strings). Game section only.

name: setwindowd_name_padding
desc: Sets padding inside dynamic window name box. Game section only.

name: setwindowd_padding
desc: Sets padding inside dynamic window dialogue box. Game section only.

name: setwindowd_dimensions
desc: Sets target position and dimensions of dynamic window. Game section only.

params.name: X position
params.desc: X coordinate of unexpanded dialogue box

name: setwindowd_main_region
desc: Sets the main dialogue region in the dynamic window image. Game section only.

name: setwindowd_non_region
desc: Sets the 'no name' region in dynamic window image. Game section only.

name: setwindowd_name_region
desc: Sets the name region in dynamic window image. Game section only.

params.name: name box extension column
params.desc: Column to extend for name box width

params.name: name region extension column
params.desc: Column to extend for remaining top width

params.name: name box extension row
params.desc: Row to extend for name box height

name: setwindowd_off
desc: Turns off dynamic window. Game section only.

name: setwindowd
desc: Enables dynamic window and sets background image. Game section only.

name: setwindow5
desc: Same as setwindow2 but forces repaint. Game section only.

name: setwindow4name
desc: Sets text metrics for character name part of dynamic window. Game section only.

params.name: wrap limit
params.desc: Width in pixels for line break

name: setwindow4
desc: Main command to set window and text style for dialogue. Game section only.

name: setwindow4
desc: Main command to set window and text style for dialogue. Game section only.

params.name: opacity
params.desc: Optional opacity when background is an image

name: setfps
desc: Sets frames per second the engine runs at. Game section only.

name: scriptmute
desc: Mutes or unmutes sound playback independently of user mutes. Game section only.

name: screenflip
desc: Disables or enables screen updating (invisible changes). Game section only.

name: rumble
desc: Rumbles a connected game controller. Game section only.

name: relaunch
desc: Restarts the engine. Game section only.

name: regex_define
desc: Defines a regular expression for use with lookahead. Game section only.

name: quakex_t
desc: Causes horizontal screen shaking of given amplitude and duration (non-blocking). Game section only.

name: quakey_t
desc: Causes vertical screen shaking (non-blocking). Game section only.

name: quake_t
desc: Causes ongoing screen shake until quake_off. Game section only.

name: quake_off
desc: Stops any ongoing screen shake. Game section only.

name: profilestop

name: past_label

captured groups

desc: Controls the object fall effect layer (rain, etc.). Game section only.

desc: Controls the object fall effect layer (rain, etc.). Game section only.

desc: Forces total script reset (reinterprets from *define).

name: d_name_refresh
desc: Refreshes name part of dialogue window.

name: d_name
desc: Sets name part of dialogue window.

name: d2
desc: Displays dialogue and continues script execution (asynchronous).

params.name: dialogue line
params.desc: Dialogue text with ` delimiters and inline commands

name: d
desc: Displays dialogue and waits for completion.

params.name: dialogue line
params.desc: Dialogue text with formatting and inline commands

name: csp2
desc: Clears extended sprites.

name: csp
desc: Clears regular sprites.

name: cselgoto
desc: Jumps to the label of the given csel choice index.

name: cselbtn
desc: Creates a button from the text of a csel choice.

name: csel
desc: Sets choices for system customization (calls *customsel).

name: click
desc: Waits for a left click (no cursor).

name: cl
desc: Clears a standing image.

params.name: position
params.desc: Position (l, c, r, a for all)

name: chvol
desc: Changes volume of a dwave channel.

name: checkpage
desc: Checks whether a backlog page is available.

params.name: pages back
params.desc: Number of pages back (1+); 0 is current page

name: checkkey
desc: Checks if a specific key was pressed at the last btnwait.

name: cellcheckspbtn
desc: Creates a button from a sprite only if it has at least 2 cells.

name: cellcheckexbtn
desc: Creates a complex button from a sprite only if it has at least 2 cells.

name: cell
desc: Sets the cell number for a regular sprite.

name: caption
desc: Sets the window title.

name: btnwait2
desc: Button wait that does not clear button definitions.

name: btnwait
desc: Button wait (clears button definitions after click).

name: btntime2
desc: Sets time limit for button wait, waiting for voice to finish.

name: btntime
desc: Sets time limit for button wait.

name: btndown
desc: Sets btnwait to return while mouse button is pressed (instead of after release).

name: btndef
desc: Loads image into button memory buffer.

name: btndef
desc: Clears image from button memory buffer.

name: btnarea
desc: Sets an area for detecting mouse cursor entry.

params.name: Y
params.desc: Y coordinate (positive: top to Y, negative: -Y to bottom)

name: btnasync
desc: No description available.

name: btn
desc: Initializes an image button.

name: br
desc: Inserts a linefeed into the text window.

name: blt
desc: Blits image from button buffer to screen instantaneously.

name: bgmvol
desc: Changes BGM volume.

name: bgmstop
desc: Stops playback of compressed music (BGM).

name: bgmonce
desc: Plays a compressed music file once (like bgm but not loop).

name: bgmfadeout
desc: Removed, use abgm_prop.

name: bgmfadein
desc: Removed, use abgm_prop.

name: bgmdownmode
desc: Toggles turning down BGM volume when voices are played.

name: bgm
desc: Plays a compressed music file in a loop.

name: bgcpy
desc: Synonym for bgcopy.

name: bgcopy
desc: Copies current screen to background.

name: bg
desc: Loads a background image.

name: bg
desc: Loads a background image.

name: bg
desc: Loads a background image.

name: barclear
desc: Clears bar display.

name: bar
desc: Creates and displays a (graph) bar.

name: avi
desc: Removed, use video instead.

name: automode_time
desc: Sets automode wait time in milliseconds.

name: autoclick
desc: Sets autoclick time in milliseconds (auto-advance).

name: amsp2
desc: Moves extended sprite absolutely.

name: amsp
desc: Moves regular sprite absolutely.

name: allsp2resume
desc: Shows all extended sprites hidden by allsp2hide.

name: allspresume
desc: Shows all regular sprites hidden by allsphide.

name: allsp2hide
desc: Hides all extended sprites (global override).

name: allsphide
desc: Hides all regular sprites (global override).

name: abssetcursor
desc: Sets cursor with absolute coordinates.
